description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.9 Docker image as the default and defining two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs `make build` and publishes the files butterbot, butterbot-darwin, and butterbot-arm64 as artifacts that expire after one month. Also in the build stage add a test job that runs `make test`. In the release stage add a release job that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, runs `echo ${CI_JOB_TOKEN} | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin ${CI_REGISTRY}`, installs make via `apk add --no-cache make`, then runs `make release`, and is limited to tags and the master branch.
